TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_nipaluma-cinpuhwan,_cinpohwan, title = nipaluma-cinpuhwan,_cinpohwan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/nipaluma-cinpuhwan,_cinpohwan} }

S.FORM: == cinpuhwan, cinpohwan == 金不換 u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika
S.PHON: == ʦinpuħwan, ʦinpoħwan == *** u sanək nu nipar~ɾuma mar~ɾaħəʦi tu imər~ɾaŋ pasubana i ʦaʦudadan a r~ɾaʦur~ɾ u zuma a ʦidəkaj a kamu, sauŋaj misapajuʔ~ʡ a ʦidəkaj u sur~ɾit nu zuma a kamu-ħur~ɾam atu amir~ɾika
S.FORM: == cinpuhwan, cinpohwan == 金不換 u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika
S.PHON: == ʦinpuħwan, ʦinpoħwan == *** u sanək nu nipar~ɾuma mar~ɾaħəʦi tu imər~ɾaŋ pasubana i ʦaʦudadan a r~ɾaʦur~ɾ u zuma a ʦidəkaj a kamu, sauŋaj misapajuʔ~ʡ a ʦidəkaj u sur~ɾit nu zuma a kamu-ħur~ɾam atu amir~ɾika
